description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a prominent glass roof structure supported by white framing, allowing ample natural light into the central living spaces. The building is primarily rectangular with clean, angular lines and a mix of dark and light exterior materials, including a large black roof section and lighter wall segments. The property includes multiple connected volumes, with a main entrance area, side extensions, and a driveway leading to a garage or carport. The windows are arranged in both large glass panels and smaller, asymmetrical placements, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The house sits on a circular plot with a paved driveway and landscaped surroundings. The overall impression is of a spacious, open-plan residence with a focus on transparency and integration with the outdoors.
description: A modern house with a striking glass roof, angular lines, and a mix of dark and light exterior materials, featuring large windows and a spacious layout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the extensive glass roof structure and the elongated main building with a dark roof section.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, driveway, and the prominent glass roof over the central area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the white-framed glass roof and the side extension with smaller windows.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the full length of the glass roof and the back extension, with less visible entry features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered overhang, wide steps, and a driveway leading to a garage; minimalistic and open design.
